title: MoreFlowerPots (Fabric)
description: Ever feel like the stock maroonish-flower pot was a bit boring? Well, say no more, as Idrae's MoreFlowerPots has been ported to Fabric.
body:
Ever feel like the stock maroonish-flower pot was a bit boring? Well, say no more, as Idrae's MoreFlowerPots has been ported to Fabric.

![Pots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TSzLgyOO/images/6e48e355962b5dbaf78e4f38d754079d504ea8af.png)
